user.title: Set up Medisana scale
user.description: The scale only broadcasts over Bluetooth right after a weighing. Step on your scale now and wait for the measurement to finish — then click Submit and we'll listen for it. You have 60 seconds.

bluetooth_confirm.title: Confirm scale
bluetooth_confirm.description: Do you want to add the Medisana scale **{name}** ({address}) to Home Assistant?

error.scale_not_found: No scale picked up during the scan. Step on the scale again until the measurement completes, then try once more.

abort.no_devices_found: No unconfigured Medisana scales were found nearby.

init.title: Name the scale users
init.description: The Medisana scale tracks up to 8 user slots internally (1 to 8). Enter a display name for any slot you use — these names become the device name in Home Assistant and show up as the prefix on every sensor for that user. Leave a slot empty to fall back to a generic label.
